name: humanspec_LCR16a_ape_gibbon
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: LCR16a_ape. Status in Nomascus leucogenys: 'shared_ancestral_duplicon'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr16:~20.0 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr16. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for LCR16a_ape. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. LCR16a_ape)
